Trigger.name: GMCP Rooms
Trigger.script:
if not Legacy then return end
-- Safely toggle Mudlet map/UI panes (these objects can be nil early in load) if Map and Map.show then pcall(function() Map:show() end) end if Legacy.UI and Legacy.UI.Map and Legacy.UI.Map.show then pcall(function() Legacy.UI.Map:show() end) end if wilderness_map_container and wilderness_map_container.hide then pcall(function() wilderness_map_container:hide() end) end if Wilderness and Wilderness.hide then pcall(function() Wilderness:hide() end) end if Ocean and Ocean.hide then pcall(function() Ocean:hide() end) end

regexCodeList.string: return (gmcp and gmcp.Room and gmcp.Room.Info and tonumber(gmcp.Room.Info.num or 0) < 2121028)
return (gmcp and gmcp.Room and gmcp.Room.Info and tonumber(gmcp.Room.Info.num or 0) > 0)
return (gmcp and gmcp.Room and gmcp.Room.Info and tonumber(gmcp.Room.Info.num or 0) > 2121028)
return (gmcp and gmcp.Room and gmcp.Room.Info and (gmcp.Room.Info.coords or "")=="")

Trigger.name: Catch All
Trigger.script: selectCurrentLine() copy() if wilderness_map_container and wilderness_map_container.show then pcall(function() wilderness_map_container:show() end) end if Map and Map.hide then pcall(function() Map:hide() end) end if Wilderness and Wilderness.show then pcall(function() Wilderness:show() end) end if Ocean and Ocean.hide then pcall(function() Ocean:hide() end) end --x = x..'\n'..getSelection() appendBuffer("Wilderness") deleteLine()

regexCodeList.string: return (gmcp and gmcp.Room and gmcp.Room.Info and gmcp.Room.Info.environment=='Vessel')
return (gmcp and gmcp.Room and gmcp.Room.Info and tonumber(gmcp.Room.Info.num or 0)==-2)

Trigger.name: Catch All
Trigger.script: selectCurrentLine() copy() if wilderness_map_container and wilderness_map_container.show then pcall(function() wilderness_map_container:show() end) end if Map and Map.hide then pcall(function() Map:hide() end) end appendBuffer("Ocean") deleteLine()

Script.name: UI Setup
Chat Box Messages
Script.script:
function ChatBoxMessages() if not Legacy then return end Legacy.Settings = Legacy.Settings or {} Legacy.Settings.UI = Legacy.Settings.UI or {} Legacy.Settings.UI.Chatbox = Legacy.Settings.UI.Chatbox or { ignoreMobs = false } if not (Legacy.UI and Legacy.UI.Chatbox) then return end if not (gmcp and gmcp.Comm and gmcp.Comm.Channel and gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text) then return end local txt = gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text local talker = (txt.talker and txt.talker:title()) or "" local channel = txt.channel or "" local rawtext = txt.text or "" if Legacy.Settings.UI.Chatbox.ignoreMobs and (Legacy.NDB and Legacy.NDB.db) and Legacy.NDB.db[talker] == nil and talker ~= "You" then return end local msg = ansi2decho(rawtext)
--rawtext:gsub("%\27%[[%dl;]+m", "") if msg:match("says to you") then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Direct:decho(msg.."
") end
if channel:match("clt") then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Clans:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Clanstab:flash(1) tempTimer(2, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Clanstab:flash(1)]]) tempTimer(4, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Clanstab:flash(1)]]) elseif channel == "says" then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Says:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Saystab:flash(1) tempTimer(2, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Saystab:flash(1)]]) tempTimer(4, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Saystab:flash(1)]]) elseif channel == "party" then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Party:decho(msg.."
") elseif channel:match("tell") then if channel == "armytell" then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") else Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Tells:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Tellstab:flash(1) tempTimer(2, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Tellstab:flash(1)]]) tempTimer(4, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Tellstab:flash(1)]]) end elseif channel == "ct" then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.City:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Citytab:flash(1) tempTimer(2, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Citytab:flash(1)]]) tempTimer(4, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Citytab:flash(1)]]) elseif channel == "market" then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Market:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Markettab:flash(1) tempTimer(2, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Markettab:flash(1)]]) tempTimer(4, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Markettab:flash(1)]]) Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
")
elseif channel == "ht" or channel == "hts" or channel == "hnt" then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.House:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Housetab:flash(1) tempTimer(2, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Housetab:flash(1)]]) tempTimer(4, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Housetab:flash(1)]])
elseif channel == "newbie" then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Newbie:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Newbietab:flash(1) tempTimer(2, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Newbietab:flash(1)]]) tempTimer(4, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Newbietab:flash(1)]]) else Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") end end registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text", "ChatBoxMessages")

Script.name: Legacy AK Display
Script.script:
function Legacy_AK_Draw() if Legacy then if not ak then return end Legacy.UI.AK = Adjustable.Container:new({ name = "Aff Tracking", x = 0, y = 0, width = 300, height = 300
})
Legacy.UI.AK.Label = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "Ak Label", x=0,y=0, width = "100%", height = "100%" }, Legacy.UI.AK)
Legacy.UI.AK.Label:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: black; border-width: 3px; border-style: solid; border-color: ]]..Legacy.UI.borderColor..[[; border-radius: 10px; ]] )
Legacy.UI.AK.TargetLabel = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "Target Label", x = 3, y = 3, width = "100%-6", height = "20%"
}, Legacy.UI.AK.Label)
Legacy.UI.AK.TargetLabel:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: black; border-width: 3px; border-style: solid; border-color: ]]..Legacy.UI.borderColor..[[; border-radius: 10px; ]] ) Legacy.UI.AK.TargetConsole = Geyser.MiniConsole:new({ name = "Target Console", x = 4, y = 4, width = "100%-8", height = "100%-9", color='black', fontSize = 10, scrollbar = false, font = "Bitstream Vera Sans Mono", autoWrap = false }, Legacy.UI.AK.TargetLabel)
Legacy.UI.AK.Console = Geyser.MiniConsole:new({ name = "Aff Console", x = 4, y = "22%", width = "100%-8", height = "80%-15", color='Black', fontSize = 10, scrollbar = false, font = "Bitstream Vera Sans Mono", autoWrap = false }, Legacy.UI.AK.Label)
function Legacy.UI.AK.Update()
-- Guard: no target / basher running / no NDB record if target == nil or target == "None" or target == "none" then return end if Legacy.Settings.Basher.status == true then return end
local tname = target if type(target) == "table" then if type(target.title) == "function" then tname = target:title() elseif type(target.title) == "string" then tname = target.title elseif type(target.name) == "string" then tname = target.name end end if type(tname) ~= "string" or tname == "" or tname == "None" or tname == "none" then return end if not (Legacy and Legacy.NDB and Legacy.NDB.db) or Legacy.NDB.db[tname] == nil then return end
Legacy.UI.AK.Console:clear() Legacy.UI.AK.TargetConsole:clear() ak.healthpercent = math.floor((ak.currenthealth/ak.maxhealth)*100) ak.manapercent = math.floor((ak.currentmana/ak.maxmana)*100)
Legacy.UI.AK.TargetConsole:cecho("<gold>Target: <"..Legacy.Settings.NDB.Config[Legacy.NDB.db[tname].city:lower()].color..">"..tname.."\n") Legacy.UI.AK.TargetConsole:cecho("<ansi_white>Health: <forest_green>"..ak.healthpercent.."% <ansi_white>Mana: <cyan>"..ak.manapercent.."%\n") Legacy.UI.AK.TargetConsole:cecho("<gold>Rebounding: ") if ak.defs.rebounding == true then Legacy.UI.AK.TargetConsole:cecho("<green>YES") else Legacy.UI.AK.TargetConsole:cecho("<red>NO") end Legacy.UI.AK.TargetConsole:cecho(" <gold>Shield: ") if ak.defs.shield == true then Legacy.UI.AK.TargetConsole:cecho("<green>YES") else Legacy.UI.AK.TargetConsole:cecho("<red>NO") end local lockaffs = {"impatience", "paralysis", "asthma", "slickness", "anorexia"} Legacy.UI.AK.Console:cecho("<orange>Limbs: "..lb.prompt().."\n") for k,v in pairs(affstrack.score) do
if v > 0 then if table.contains(lockaffs, k) then Legacy.UI.AK.Console:cecho("\n<red>"..tostring(k):title().." "..math.floor(v)) else Legacy.UI.AK.Console:cecho("\n<green>"..tostring(k):title().." "..math.floor(v)) end end end end registerAnonymousEventHandler("LPrompt", "Legacy.UI.AK.Update") else tempTimer(5, [[Legacy_AK_Draw()]]) end end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("LegacyLoaded", "Legacy_AK_Draw")
